name: Frosty Applesauce Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and sugar together until creamy.
2. Add eggs, one at a time, beating after each addition.
3. Sift together dry ingredients and add to creamed mixture alternately with milk.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients.
5. Pour batter into greased and floured 1-1/2 qt. ring mold.
6. Bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes.
7. Loosen edges; cool for 10 minutes.
8. Remove from pan and cool completely.
9. Frost with thin confectioners' sugar frosting, if desired.
